description_long: This bungalow is a modern, two-story residential building with a flat, overhanging roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade features a large covered porch area, wide glass windows, and a combination of white and light green exterior walls. The structure includes a spacious balcony on one side, supported by columns, and a mix of paved and grassy landscaping around the perimeter. The rear and side elevations show a more minimal window arrangement, with some grouped windows and a secondary entrance. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with a focus on open, functional outdoor spaces. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a covered porch, featuring white and green exterior walls and a spacious balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, large windows, and a mix of paved and grassy areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the spacious balcony, secondary entrance, and minimal window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view with grouped windows and a large expanse of green lawn, minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, circular wall features, and the edge of the balcony structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and wide front-facing windows
